packageRules.description: Auto-merge patch updates (0.0.x). Low risk, always compatible. CI must pass.
Auto-merge minor updates for devDependencies only. Runtime deps need eyes.
Group React + React DOM together. They must always be bumped in lockstep.
Group Next.js updates so framework + ESLint config bump together.
Never auto-merge framework majors. Next.js / React majors always need a human.
Keep Node engine requirement pinned — only update Node when I say so.

prHeader: Automated dependency update from Renovate. Review the changelog entries below before merging; auto-merge only applies to the categories configured in `renovate.json`.
